name: Sajin Komamura
description:
__Height:__ 288 cm (9'5½")
__Occupation:__ Captain of the 7th Division
__Theme Song:__ "Don't Turn Away" by White Wolf 

Captain of the 7th Division  Komamura is the largest normal character in Bleach, being 57 cm taller (288 cm) than his subordinate Jirōbō (the runner-up) and even more physically imposing. The only larger human characters are the Seireitei gatekeepers, who are each roughly thirty feet tall. He is also quite unusual in that he is an anthropomorphic canine; the specific animal is unclear, as he has characteristics of both foxes and wolves. He has been called a "bastard wolf" on occasion by Kenpachi Zaraki, but has red fur like a fox.
